scripts.preinstall: node -e "try{require('fs').unlinkSync('package-lock.json')}catch(e){} try{require('fs').unlinkSync('yarn.lock')}catch(e){} const ua=process.env.npm_config_user_agent||''; const allow=ua.includes('pnpm')||process.env.VERCEL||process.env.CI; if(!allow){console.error('Use pnpm instead');process.exit(1)}"
scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm -r --if-present run build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
